title: LumiKids Printable Tracing Letters
prompt:
Playful 2D illustration for a printable kids tracing worksheet, big friendly letters with dashed tracing path, pencil and stars, pastel palette, premium children's education style, clean composition, no text beyond decorative letters

Avoid: photorealistic, cluttered, watermark, scary, dark shadows, full words
